goal: Close the unfinished A1 branch to a final PROMOTE/REJECT verdict, then explore at most one additional low-friction candidate before any medium-friction expansion.
global_constraints: active-signal-v1@1 is the immutable reference; never modify its hours, days, thresholds, or execution logic
Nothing may be declared an improvement unless it passes strict additive integration, permissive integration, ownership, and cannibalization proof
At most one low-friction branch (A2 or A3) may be open at any time
Wave B (medium-friction: cross-symbol, model-backed routing, hybrids) is forbidden until A1 is closed AND the chosen A2/A3 branch is fully resolved AND neither produced a promoted candidate
Every branch must reach an explicit PROMOTE / WATCHLIST / REJECT decision before another branch is opened

stages.title: Аудит артефактов v2 и фиксация инвариантов v3
stages.objective: Establish a clean v3 research project with a single immutable reference, a structured hypothesis atlas, and explicit branch-closure discipline before any new work begins.
actions: Open a new research_project for v3
Record an explicit v2 postmortem in research_memory
Lock a single reference snapshot (active-signal-v1@1)
Define research_map axes: branch, data_layer, regime_type, acceptance_stage, final_decision
Establish branch status vocabulary: active, hold, rejected, promoted, watchlist
success_criteria: Clean v3 project exists with unambiguous reference snapshot
Hypothesis atlas is defined in research_map
Branch closure discipline is recorded as a project invariant

stages.title: Полный forensic-review ветки A1
stages.objective: Reconstruct the exact logic, artifacts, and claimed results of the A1_high_iv_long_v1 branch from v2 to establish a reproducible baseline before any new testing.
actions: Recover all A1 artifacts from v2
Reproduce and fix the exact A1 signal logic
Check for drift or mismatch between v2 claims and actual reproducible results
Produce a trade anatomy summary and per-trade statistics
success_criteria: A1 logic is strictly and reproducibly documented in a v3 snapshot
v2 claimed results are compared against v3 reproduced results
Any drift or mismatch is explicitly recorded

stages.title: Stability и concentration для A1
stages.objective: Determine whether A1 survives rigorous window-stability and concentration checks as a genuine specialist layer rather than a result of a few lucky trades.
actions: Run window stability analysis on A1 across quarters, half-years, and rolling windows
Check stability across hour-of-day, day-of-week, and cl_1h conditioning
Test resilience after removing the strongest historical segment
Apply hard rule: if A1 turns negative after removing one strong segment or top trades, it is not mainline-quality
success_criteria: Honest verdict on A1 standalone stability is recorded
Window-by-window results are documented
Concentration risk is quantified

stages.title: Обязательная интеграция A1 в двух режимах
stages.objective: Prove whether A1 is genuinely additive to the immutable base by running both strict-additive and permissive-integrated modes against the unchanged reference.
actions: Run strict additive integration of A1 on top of active-signal-v1@1
Run permissive integration of A1 with the base
Compare both modes against the unchanged base (delta PnL, trades, profit factor, drawdown)
Evaluate weak-quarter repair capability
success_criteria: Complete integration picture for A1 exists with delta metrics in both modes
Strict vs permissive comparison is documented
Weak-quarter repair assessment is complete

stages.title: Ownership, cannibalization и proof of new entries для A1
stages.objective: Attribute the nature of A1's delta to the base — prove it creates genuinely new positive entries rather than cannibalizing existing base trades.
actions: Compute trade overlap between A1 and the base
Count truly new trades vs replaced base trades
Run layer_compare and signal_ownership analysis
Measure coverage expansion
Deliver a final answer: does A1 genuinely expand the system?
success_criteria: Overlap, new-trade PnL, and cannibalization metrics are quantified
Ownership analysis confirms or denies genuine expansion
Sufficient evidence exists for a definitive PROMOTE/REJECT decision on A1

stages.title: Финальное решение по A1
stages.objective: Close the A1 branch with an irreversible decision: PROMOTE, WATCHLIST SPECIALIST, or REJECT.
actions: Review all evidence from stages 2–5
Assign one of: PROMOTE / WATCHLIST SPECIALIST / REJECT
Record main reason, revisit conditions, and notes in research_memory
success_criteria: A1 has an explicit, final decision with documented rationale
A1 branch is definitively closed

stages.title: Выбор ровно одной следующей low-friction ветки (если A1 не promoted)
stages.objective: If A1 was not promoted, select exactly one next low-friction branch (A2_iv_acceleration preferred, A3_broader_cl_transition as fallback) and prepare its feature and hypothesis contracts.
actions: Select one branch: A2_iv_acceleration (priority 1) or A3_broader_cl_transition (priority 2)
Prepare feature contract and hypothesis contract for chosen branch
Ensure the chosen branch is ready for plausibility check, strict prototype build, and standalone test
success_criteria: Exactly one next branch is selected with documented rationale
Feature and hypothesis contracts are prepared
Branch is ready for clean standalone testing
stages.gate_hint: Only executes if A1 decision is not PROMOTE; otherwise skip to stage_10

stages.title: A2_iv_acceleration: prototype и standalone тест
stages.objective: Test whether IV dynamics produce a genuine specialist layer by building a compact feature set (max 3–4 features), validating on base-absent surface, and assembling strict prototypes.
actions: Build compact feature set (max 3–4 IV-dynamics features)
Run causality check, warmup check, and materialization check
Test features on base-absent surface
Build max 2–3 strict prototypes
Run standalone backtests on each prototype
success_criteria: Either one mature A2 prototype passes plausibility and standalone checks
Or an honest early-reject verdict is recorded
stages.gate_hint: Only executes if A2_iv_acceleration was selected in stage_7; mutually exclusive with stage_9

stages.title: A3_broader_cl_transition: prototype и standalone тест
stages.objective: Test whether broader classifier transitions produce a genuine specialist layer by building transition features, grouping by semantic meaning, and validating on base-absent surface.
actions: Build transition features from broader classifier set
Group transitions by semantic meaning
Test features on base-absent surface
Build max 2 strict prototypes
Run standalone backtests on each prototype
success_criteria: Either one mature A3 prototype passes plausibility and standalone checks
Or an honest early-reject verdict is recorded
stages.gate_hint: Only executes if A3_broader_cl_transition was selected in stage_7; mutually exclusive with stage_8

stages.title: Запрет на medium-friction wave до закрытия low-friction
stages.objective: Enforce the hard gate that prevents premature expansion into cross-symbol, model-backed routing, or hybrid strategies until all low-friction branches are exhausted without a promoted candidate.
actions: Verify A1 branch is definitively closed
Verify the chosen A2/A3 branch is definitively closed
Confirm Wave B has NOT been opened
Record gate status in research_memory
success_criteria: Gate status is explicitly recorded: all low-friction branches closed
Wave B remains sealed unless both branches produced no promoted candidate

stages.title: Финальный отчет агента
stages.objective: Produce the mandatory structured report covering v2 gaps, A1 closure, branch selection rationale, next-branch results, overall v3 outcome, and v4 recommendations.
actions: Document what was unfinished in v2
Document how A1 was closed and whether it was a genuine additive layer
Document which next branch was selected and why
Document what the next branch showed
State the main outcome of plan_v3
Provide concrete recommendations for plan_v4
success_criteria: All seven mandatory report sections are completed
Report is stored in research_memory

warnings: Stages 7A and 7B are mutually exclusive branches gated on A1 not being promoted and the respective branch being selected
Stage 8 (medium-friction gate) is a policy checkpoint with no computational actions
